description_long: This object is a short sword with a broad, double-edged blade that tapers to a rounded point. The blade is metallic, featuring a central fuller and a two-tone coloration with a lighter edge and a darker central ridge. The guard is simple and rounded, colored in a muted gold or brass tone, with a circular green accent at the center. The handle is wrapped in a dark brown material, contoured for grip, and ends in a rounded pommel. The overall design is robust and functional, with minimal ornamentation, suggesting utility over display. The proportions and stylized features indicate it could be used as a prop or decorative piece in an urban or fantasy-themed environment.
description: A short, broad-bladed sword with a metallic finish, gold-toned guard, and a contoured brown handle. The design is sturdy and functional, with a central green accent on the guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blade, the gold guard with green accent, and the contoured handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, guard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the sword and handle.
attribute_blade_type: straight, double-edged, broad, with central fuller
attribute_handle_design: contoured, wrapped, dark brown, rounded pommel
